zh.Standish, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan Standish於1234年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親Ralph Standish26歲，母親Cecilia Bradshaw24歲。他於大約1254年與Alianora在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jordan Standish于1234年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲Ralph Standish26岁，母亲Cecilia Bradshaw24岁。他于大约1254年与Alianora在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1290年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan Standish was born in 1234, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, Ralph Standish, was 26 and his mother, Cecilia Bradshaw, was 24. He married Alianora about 1254, in Standish, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1290, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordan Standish est né en 1234, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Standish, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Bradshaw, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alianora environ 1254, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1290, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordan Standish 1234 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Standish 26 und seine Mutter Cecilia Bradshaw 24. Er hat um 1254 in Standish, Lancashire, England Alianora geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1290 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan Standish è nato il nel 1234 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Standish, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Bradshaw, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alianora circa 1254, nel Standish, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1290, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan Standish(이)가 1234년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Standish(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Bradshaw(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1254년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Alianora(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan Standish nasceu em 1234, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Standish, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Bradshaw, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianora aproximadamente 1254, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1290, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan Standish родился в 1234 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Standish было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Bradshaw, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianora около 1254 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1290 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
